rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to component ports
Use component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings and assignments
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax
Constants, equations, and declarations belong in component type annexes
Assignments and bindings belong in component implementation annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` for boolean range comparisons with explicit type alignment
Avoid referencing AADL properties like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables
anti_patterns: Do not reference opaque Boolean data as integers in AGREE expressions
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing constraints
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
